project: Crônica de Aethelgard: O Destino das Cinzas
art_style_master_guidelines: High fantasy bestiary creature illustration, detailed anatomical painting, dramatic combat lighting, dark fantasy RPG card art aesthetic.

creatures.name: Capitão Mercenário Renegado
creatures.composition: Battle-hardened mercenary captain in battered iron plate armor over chainmail. He wields a heavy notched greatsword with both hands, shouting battle orders amidst smoke and burning village debris.
creatures.lighting: Harsh orange fire glow from burning structures casting dramatic shadows across scratched iron armor.

creatures.name: Lobo-Sombrio de Lúmen
creatures.composition: Enormous corrupted wolf creature crouching low on a mossy boulder inside a dark forest. Its fur is pitch black with faint violet mist smoking from its shoulders, and double glowing yellow eyes crouch ready to pounce.
creatures.lighting: Moonlight rim lighting along its black fur with eerie violet mist contrast.

creatures.name: Gárgula de Obsidiana de Aethel-Khaz
creatures.composition: Massive stone gargoyle sentinel awakening inside underground ruins. Carved from dark obsidian with glowing crimson runes etched into its chest and stone wings unfurling.
creatures.lighting: Deep cavern darkness pierced by intense crimson runic light glowing from within the stone seams.

creatures.name: Feiticeiro Renegado da Magia de Sangue
creatures.composition: A corrupted dark sorcerer levitating slightly above swamp waters. He wears ragged crimson and black robes, holding an ornate bone staff while glowing liquid blood magic spirals around his outstretched hand.
creatures.lighting: Eerie red and violet magical glow illuminating his hollow cheeks and dark robes.

creatures.name: Titã de Ferro e Aço-Dragão
creatures.composition: Colossal mechanical and alchemical golem towering over desert sands. Built from heavy bronze and iron plates with smokestacks venting alchemical fire from its shoulders and glowing orange pistons.
creatures.lighting: Harsh desert sunlight reflecting off burnished bronze combined with internal furnace glow.

creatures.name: Wyvern das Sombras Selvagem
creatures.composition: A ferocious two-legged winged wyvern diving from snowy mountain crags. Its scales are dark slate grey with venomous green barbs along its tail and razor-sharp talons extended.
creatures.lighting: Alpine sunlight breaking through mist, highlighting the sharp texture of its leathery wings.
